hero.kicker: Content & AI Writing · Ansiversa mini app
hero.title: Speech Writer
hero.description: Plan speech projects, draft occasion-ready speeches, save reusable templates, and track revision history in one owner-scoped workspace.

flow.title: Projects → Speeches → Templates → History
steps: Create a speech project with occasion, audience, tone, date, and purpose.
Draft and revise speeches tied to the project.
Save reusable speech templates and track revision or delivery history.

differences.title: Keep speech writing organized by occasion
differences.description: Speech Writer separates event context, speech drafts, reusable templates, and history so users can manage prepared speaking work without bloated list payloads.

items.title: Occasion context
items.description: Projects store the audience, event date, tone, purpose, and private notes that guide each speech.

items.title: Draft clarity
items.description: Speeches keep speaker, duration, key message, status, and full draft text behind detail endpoints.

items.title: Reusable memory
items.description: Templates and history preserve repeatable speech structures and revision context without becoming global shell features.

feel.title: A focused workspace for prepared speaking
feel.description: The app keeps speech preparation structured, editable, and easy to scan across events.

items.title: Start with the occasion
items.description: Define the project once, then attach speech drafts and templates to that context.

items.title: Shape the message
items.description: Keep key message, speaker, duration, and draft text connected to the right event.

items.title: Review progress
items.description: Use templates and history to reuse strong structures and track revisions before delivery.

audiences.title: Who uses Speech Writer
audiences.description: Built for users who prepare speeches for work, school, events, and personal occasions.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Prepare workplace speeches, announcements, and leadership remarks.

items.title: Students
items.description: Organize presentations and event speeches around audience and purpose.

items.title: Event speakers
items.description: Draft and revise occasion-specific speeches without losing context.

resourceSection.title: Speech workspace essentials
resourceSection.description: The workflow keeps long-lived records editable while history remains scoped to speech activity.

items.title: Projects
items.description: Store event purpose, audience, date, tone, and notes.

items.title: Speeches
items.description: Hold editable drafts, key messages, speaker context, and readiness status.

items.title: Templates and history
items.description: Capture reusable structures and track drafting, review, or delivery events.

groupedSection.title: Build a practical speech library
groupedSection.description: Move from event context toward polished and reusable speech drafts.

items.name: Occasion
items.description: Clarify where and why the speech will be delivered.

items.name: Audience
items.description: Keep the listener context visible while drafting.

items.name: Speech
items.description: Save editable speech text with key message and status.

items.name: Template
items.description: Capture reusable outlines for future occasions.

technicalSection.title: Designed for the platform foundation
technicalSection.description: Speech Writer follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture and User API Response Contract.
items: Lightweight dashboard and list responses with detail endpoints for editable records.
Protected workflow pages under /speech-writer/projects, speeches, templates, and history.

finalCta.title: Explore speech writing
finalCta.description: Open the projects workflow to start organizing speech drafts.
